whoWeAre.title: Where experience, service, and fresh energy unite for your success
whoWeAre.intro: We are A&J Real Estate — a family-centered, service-driven team committed to guiding you home with integrity and clarity. We combine market knowledge, strategy, and genuine care to help you build stability, security, and a place your family can truly call home.

profile.otherTitle: Meet the rest of the team

adriana.tagline: Lead agent, trusted across Virginia and North Carolina — and a proud mom of three.
bio: Adriana Meléndez leads A&J Real Estate Group with a deep commitment to families and long-term relationships. With years of experience across Virginia and North Carolina, she guides buyers and sellers through every step with honesty, patience, and genuine care.

As a mother of three, Adriana understands what it means to find a place a family can truly call home. She pairs sharp market knowledge with a warm, personal approach so every client feels supported from the first conversation to the closing table.

john.tagline: Agent and active-duty Navy serviceman bringing discipline and strategy to every deal.
bio: John Leonard brings the focus and discipline of active-duty Navy service to real estate. He approaches each transaction with strategic precision, clear communication, and a steady hand that puts clients at ease.
Having experienced the realities of relocation and military life firsthand, John is especially attuned to the needs of service members and families on the move across Hampton Roads.

viviane.tagline: Agent, civil engineer, and trilingual mom offering an analytical, detail-driven approach.
bio: Viviane Chiu pairs a civil engineering background with a sharp eye for detail, helping clients make confident, well-informed decisions. Her analytical approach means nothing gets overlooked — from a property's condition to the numbers behind the deal.
Trilingual and multicultural, Viviane connects easily with families from all backgrounds across Hampton Roads, offering attentive service in English, Spanish, and Portuguese.

melany.tagline: Bilingual agent and new mom bringing fresh energy and heart to growing families.
bio: Melany Valencia brings fresh energy, enthusiasm, and a genuine love for helping families find their place. As a bilingual agent, she makes the process clear and welcoming for Spanish- and English-speaking clients alike.
A new mom herself, Melany deeply understands the hopes and needs of growing families, and she's dedicated to making each client feel heard, supported, and excited about the journey ahead.

footer.tagline: A family-centered, bilingual real estate team guiding families home across Virginia and North Carolina.
